title: About buildah pull --all
body:
Is it necessary to add the `--all` option to the `pull` command to download the image of all tags？
I find `podman` does not have that either.

comments.body:
Did not know that exists, so yes we should add this flag.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Could you look into adding this flag to buildah and podman.
@QiWang19 might be something you could look at if @TomSweeneyRedHat Does not have time.
This issue is closed because the related functions have been completed.
